01 — About Me

Language Education

Waseem Uddin Qureshi

A dedicated educator transforming language barriers into bridges of communication — empowering students of all linguistic backgrounds.

Dedication

I am a dedicated and passionate English Language Teacher with strong communication and classroom management skills. My teaching philosophy centers on making language learning accessible, interactive, and genuinely transformative for every student.

Experienced in teaching Spoken English, Grammar, Vocabulary, and Communication Skills through interactive and student-friendly methods. I have a unique ability to connect with students from diverse linguistic backgrounds.

Having completed professional training through SPELT International — a prestigious teacher development organization — I bring research-backed teaching practices to every classroom. My goal is not just to teach English, but to build confidence and fluency that students carry for life.
